flags.concern: Task API: Step 17 removes the raw `createTask({ project_id, task_type, params })` path before migrating all existing direct callers.
flags.evidence: The repo still has raw `createTask(...)` task creators outside the listed 6 families + 4 outliers: `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/modes/useVideoEditing.ts:105`, `src/tools/edit-video/hooks/useReplaceMode.ts:337`, and `src/tools/character-animate/lib/characterAnimate.ts:127`. Following the plan as written would break those paths while claiming a clean migration of every caller.

flags.concern: Travel contracts: Scope creep: deleting `src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/` would remove shared read-side contracts and helpers, not just task creation code.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/index.ts:1-31` re-exports types/defaults/read helpers like `resolvePrimaryStructureVideo`, and those are consumed across UI code such as `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/SharedGenerationView.tsx:22` and `src/shared/components/SegmentSettingsForm/segmentSettingsUtils.ts:2-6`. The directory is not creation-only, so deleting it is broader than the stated migration.

flags.concern: Family exports: deleting all of `src/shared/lib/tasks/families/` is incomplete because several family modules are used as shared type surfaces, not only as task builders.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/components/ImageGenerationForm/types.ts:2` imports `ReferenceMode` from `@/shared/lib/tasks/families/imageGeneration` and re-exports family API types at `:136+`; `src/shared/components/modals/ImageGenerationModal.tsx:10,44-56` imports both `createBatchImageGenerationTasks` and `BatchImageGenerationTaskParams`; `src/shared/components/SegmentSettingsForm/segmentSettingsUtils.ts:6` imports `IndividualTravelSegmentParams`. The plan names a few call-site rewrites, but not relocation of these shared types/contracts.

flags.concern: Response handling: the planned batch and travel response shape changes are not wired through the existing client parsing and placeholder lifecycle.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/lib/taskCreation/parseTaskCreationResponse.ts:24-40` only accepts a single `task_id`. `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTaskPlaceholder.ts:33-64` only extracts IDs from `task_id` or arrays of `{ task_id }`, not `{ task_ids: string[] }`. Also `src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/createTravelBetweenImagesTask.ts:94-103` currently gets `parentGenerationId` from client-side preparation, so Step 15's server-returned `parentGenerationId` needs an explicit parsing path that the plan does not cover.

flags.concern: Cleanup inventory: Step 18 proposes deleting shared client utilities that are still used outside the task-building flow.
flags.evidence: `src/shared/lib/taskCreation/resolution.ts:33` is still used by reference-processing flows in `src/shared/components/ImageGenerationForm/hooks/referenceUpload/referenceDomainService.ts:8,79-80` and `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useReferences.ts:10,76`. `src/shared/lib/taskCreation/ids.ts:1-19` is also used outside task creation, e.g. `src/tools/video-editor/data/SupabaseDataProvider.ts:2,137`. `src/shared/lib/tasks/segmentGenerationPersistence.ts:71-80` still exports `persistSegmentEnhancedPrompt`, which is imported by `src/domains/media-lightbox/components/submitSegmentTask.ts:24`.

flags.concern: Batch idempotency: the batch insert design does not match the current edge function's single-key duplicate-recovery logic.
flags.evidence: Current duplicate recovery in `supabase/functions/create-task/index.ts:158-178` assumes one insert, one `idempotency_key`, and one `.single()` recovery query. A multi-row `.insert(array)` with per-task keys can fail the whole batch on one unique-key conflict, and the current recovery path cannot map that failure back to multiple existing task IDs. The plan says 'one idempotency key per task' but does not specify conflict handling or partial recovery semantics.
